message:
fix(storage): reduce columns updated during skill upsert

Optimize the skill upsert query to only update columns that should
change when a skill is re-indexed, preserving source metadata.

Columns now preserved on conflict (not updated):
- source_path: Original file location should not change
- git_remote: Git origin remains constant
- git_commit: Preserves original commit reference
- content_hash: Computed from content, updated via separate mechanism
- body: Full content updated through indexing pipeline
- assets_json: Asset metadata managed separately
- quality_score: Computed score should persist
- indexed_at: Original index timestamp preserved
- is_deprecated: Manual deprecation flag preserved
- deprecation_reason: Manual deprecation reason preserved

Columns still updated on conflict:
- name, description, version, author: Basic metadata may change
- source_layer: Layer assignment may change
- metadata_json: Structured metadata may be updated
- token_count: Recalculated during indexing
- modified_at: Always update modification timestamp

This prevents accidental data loss when re-indexing skills and ensures
that manually-set fields (like deprecation status) are not overwritten.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -229,20 +229,10 @@ impl Database {
                 description=excluded.description,
                 version=excluded.version,
                 author=excluded.author,
-                source_path=excluded.source_path,
                 source_layer=excluded.source_layer,
-                git_remote=excluded.git_remote,
-                git_commit=excluded.git_commit,
-                content_hash=excluded.content_hash,
-                body=excluded.body,
                 metadata_json=excluded.metadata_json,
-                assets_json=excluded.assets_json,
                 token_count=excluded.token_count,
-                quality_score=excluded.quality_score,
-                indexed_at=excluded.indexed_at,
-                modified_at=excluded.modified_at,
-                is_deprecated=excluded.is_deprecated,
-                deprecation_reason=excluded.deprecation_reason",
+                modified_at=excluded.modified_at",
             params![
                 skill.id,
                 skill.name,
